title: Vežba 94

questions.text:
Nakon razgovora sa Markom, Lisa je otkrila da problem utiče na ceo tim, pa je napisala obaveštenje za sve.

Hi team,

Just a quick update: I spoke with Mark about a glitching issue in the menu — it sometimes disappears or shows the wrong options and acts weird. We also noticed flickering when switching tabs. The behavior is not consistent, but it happens enough to be a problem.

After checking a few machines, I confirmed it's happening across the team. It looks like a graphics driver or rendering problem, possibly linked to event handling in the UI framework.

Please update your graphics drivers as soon as possible. If the issue continues, we'll run further diagnostics.

Let me know if you have questions.

Lisa

Šta je Lisa potvrdila nakon pregleda drugih računara?

answers.feedback: Lisa je rekla da se problem dogodio često u timu, a ne samo jednom.
Nema objašnjenja za novu funkciju koja uzrokuje problem.

answers.answer: Svi kompjuteri su trebali da se restartuju.
answers.feedback: Lisa nije pomenula ponovno pokretanje kao rešenje u napomenama.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Da biste dobili tačan odgovor, obratite pažnju na ono što je Lisa potvrdila nakon pregleda druge mašine.

Nije bilo problema samo na računaru Marka — it's happening across the team.

Izaberite odgovor koji pokazuje ovo otkriće.
